items.title: Is Himalayan salt sole good for you?

expanded_element.title: Health Benefits of Sole Water - WebMD
expanded_element.description: A 1.5 gram serving of sole water contains about 18% of the daily recommended sodium value. While this is a small amount, pink Himalayan salt water can still help you boost your nutrient levels if you drink it regularly.

items.title: What are the four ingredients in the pink salt trick?
Which salt is good for BP patients?

expanded_element.title: Which Salt Is Good for High Blood Pressure? - MedicineNet
expanded_element.description: Eating too much salt of any kind is not recommended for people with high blood pressure or kidney diseases. Although Himalayan pink salt is often touted as a healthier salt because it is said to contain less sodium per serving than ordinary table salt, no large-scale studies have supported this claim.
